name: Takuji
message: "Ah, well..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, what is it?"

name: Takuji
message: "Well... for instance, why do you wear a skirt?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"
D-Did I overdo it?
Surely that must have been too direct, right?

name: Takuji
message: "Uh, not in a perverted way. Just, like, there's a normal reason for it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Okay... The reason, huh... Because the skirt is part of the uniform, I guess..."

name: Takuji
message: "Uh, no, that's not what I mean..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? Then... what do you mean?"

name: Takuji
message: "I mean, why do you wear a skirt... or even pants, why do you wear them?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?! That's... obvious, isn't it?"

name: Takuji
message: "What's obvious? Why do you wear them? It's not like there would be a problem if you didn't, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-There would be a big problem."

name: Takuji
message: "Why's that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "B-Because that would... be embarrassing, wouldn't it..."

name: Takuji
message: "Right, right! That's why... Walking around outside without a skirt on would be super embarrassing, wouldn't it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "...Yeah."
I know women have the tendency to act as if they're content at one moment and grow enraged in the very next.

name: Takuji
message: "And why would it be embarrassing? Because you don't want people to see what panties you're wearing, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "...Um, yes."

name: Takuji
message: "You wouldn't show your panties to people walking on the street outside, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Of course not!"
Takashima-san's hands tightened into fists as she looked at me sharply.

name: Takuji
message: "Then, how about that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "The secret you're keeping right here, right now..."

name: Takuji
message: "Show me the panties you're wearing right now."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah... H-Huh?"
She was surprised, but I couldn't hesitate now.

name: Takuji
message: "Like I said, show me your secret!"

name: Zakuro
message: "B-But..."
Takashima-san tried to avert her eyes in embarrassment, but I kept staring straight at her, not letting her change the subject.

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I, I... c-can't do that..."
Of course, she squirmed in discomfort and tried to refuse.
But I couldn't back down after saying it straight out like that.
Giving up here would be dangerous. If I gave up now, there was a high chance that she would tell someone 'Mamiya-kun told me to show him my panties.'
So I had to change the situation so it was as if she showed me her panties of her own free will.

name: Takuji
message: "You know how important this place is to me. You know how I try to keep it secret."

name: Takuji
message: "Do you get it? This is my 'secret base'... And yet, I told you about it, didn't I?"

name: Zakuro
message: "...Yes, you did..."

name: Takuji
message: "To me, this was a place that I could never tell anyone else about."

name: Takuji
message: "But I 'only told you'... so that I could save you when you were being chased."

name: Takuji
message: "Sadly, I don't think you understand just how special this place is to me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, but..."

name: Takuji
message: "You were the one who said it wasn't fair that you found out my secret and didn't tell me one of yours, weren't you? Weren't you?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Was that a lie? Are you one of those lowlifes that doesn't think twice about lying?"

name: Zakuro
message: "N-No... That wasn't a lie."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. You're different from the rest of those rotten girls who would even lie to their own grandmothers. You're totally different."

name: Takuji
message: "Or at least, that's what I believe."

name: Takuji
message: "I told you not to tell anyone about this place."

name: Takuji
message: "Therefore, I swear on my honor as a man that I will never tell anyone what panties you're wearing. I shall take it to my grave."

name: Takuji
message: "This is fair, right? It's exactly what you said you wanted, isn't it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oo... Ah."

name: Takuji
message: "You're not a liar... I'm only asking you this because I understand that. I believe you."

name: Takuji
message: "So, is there anything wrong with what I'm asking?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm? What did you say?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't think there is."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right, isn't it?!"
She didn't look completely convinced, but she'd gotten confused and accepted my arguments.

name: Takuji
message: "So you know what you should do, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Or were you lying when you said you were going to tell me your secret?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It wasn't a lie..."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, then!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Umm, my secret... I just need to... show you my underwear, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Th-That's right..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Alright... I'll show you..."

name: Takuji
message: "Y-Yeah..."
Those words, 'show you,' made my mouth water in anticipation.
All of this was going too well...
Everything was going too well.
She gathered her resolve and closed her eyes in embarrassment.
She grabbed the hem of her skirt and slowly lifted it up.

name: Zakuro
message: "Aah, it's too embarrassing!"

name: Takuji
message: "Tch."
So that was as far as she would go by herself...
Well, that's fine... I wouldn't be interested in a girl who was eager to lift her skirt just because a boy told her to.

name: Takuji
message: "Alright..."

name: Takuji
message: "If you stay still, just like that... I'll lift it for you."
She grew even redder and stiffer as she looked down at my hand, meekly extended toward the edge of her skirt.
She slowly lifted her skirt.
It's all going according to plan.
It's going well.
